title: Observability with LangSmith
tagline: Trace, inspect, monitor, and improve a Nebius-backed LangChain agent with LangSmith.

story.problem: A stateful agent can work locally while still being opaque in production: no trace tree, no feedback loop, and no way to debug a bad run.
story.solution: Enable the full LangSmith SaaS workflow with tracing, metadata, tags, feedback capture, privacy controls, and production monitoring guidance.
story.outcome: An observable agent whose runs can be inspected, compared, and improved without relying only on logs.

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY and LANGSMITH_API_KEY
quickstart.run: docker compose up -d postgres && uv sync && make dev

endpoints.description: Run the traced agent and stream SSE events back.
Attach user feedback to a LangSmith run.
List the inherited long-term memories stored for a user.
Summarize what the agent knows about a user.
Delete the inherited long-term memories stored for a user.
